_meta.description: Inter-module workflow checklist — vendor self-attestation that named module pairs are stitched without re-entry. 9 canonical E2E workflows.
_meta.source: Hand-curated from common ERP E2E patterns (O2C / P2P / L2C / H2R / R2R / P2Prod / Asset-Lifecycle / RMA / R2R-svc). Bolstered 2026-05-19 with tier + description per workflow.

workflows.name: Order-to-Cash
workflows.t2_bullet: Stitch order, inventory, invoice, and payment across Sales, SC, and Finance in one record
workflows.description: From confirmed sales order through fulfilment to cash receipt. Tests whether Sales, inventory, and Finance share a single record so stock commits, invoice raises, and payments post in one chain (not three disconnected systems).

questions.text: When a sales order is confirmed, does inventory automatically commit or deduct stock without re-entry into a separate inventory system?
When a customer payment is received, does the receivable balance and the GL update from one record, without separate journal entry?

workflows.name: Procure-to-Pay
workflows.t2_bullet: Match PO, GRN, and supplier invoice three ways; AP hands off to bank reconciliation automatically
workflows.description: From purchase requisition through goods receipt to supplier payment. Tests three-way matching (PO + GRN + invoice) and whether AP cleanly hands off to bank reconciliation without manual journals.

questions.text: When goods are received against a PO, does the supplier invoice match line items against the PO and GRN, then route to AP without manual matching?
When AP pays a supplier, does the payment post to the AP ledger and reconcile against the bank line from the same record?

workflows.name: Lead-to-Cash
workflows.t2_bullet: Hand lead → opportunity → order → invoice across CRM and Finance without re-keying
workflows.description: From first contact (web form, inbound lead) through qualification, opportunity, won deal, to invoiced sale. Wider than O2C, adds the prospecting + qualification stages before the order forms. Tests whether your CRM hands cleanly to Sales/Finance without re-keying.

questions.text: When a qualified lead becomes an opportunity and the opportunity wins, do the contact, account, and product line details flow forward to the order without re-keying?
When the deal closes, does the resulting invoice or receivable carry the original lead source and owner so reporting can trace revenue back to the campaign or rep?

workflows.name: Hire-to-Retire
workflows.t2_bullet: Share employee master, payroll, and termination data across HR and Finance from a single record
workflows.description: From offer-letter through onboarding, payroll cycles, performance reviews, to offboarding. Tests whether HR shares employee master data with Finance for payroll posting and cost allocation without separate spreadsheet upload.

questions.text: When payroll runs, do the salary and statutory contributions (CPF, SDL) post to the GL by department or cost centre automatically, without a manual JV upload?
When an employee is terminated, do system accesses and payroll cycles deactivate from one record, without back-channel emails to IT or Finance teams?

workflows.name: Record-to-Report
workflows.t2_bullet: Run period close with subledger lock and one-click TB/P&L/BS, no Excel consolidation
workflows.description: Month-end and year-end close cycle. From subledger close (AR / AP / inventory / fixed-assets) through GL close to management reports. Tests whether Finance orchestrates the close without separate Excel-based consolidation.

questions.text: At period-close, do AR, AP, inventory, and fixed-asset subledgers lock automatically once the period is closed in the GL — preventing back-dated postings?
Can you generate a trial balance, P&L, and balance sheet directly from the system at any point in the close, without exporting to Excel for adjustments?

workflows.name: Plan-to-Produce
workflows.t2_bullet: Run MRP against live inventory; finished goods become available to Sales without manual stock adjustment
workflows.description: From sales-driven demand plan through MRP, production orders, raw-material consumption, to finished-goods receipt. Manufacturing-specific. Tests whether MRP sees live inventory and whether finished goods are immediately available to Sales without a manual stock adjustment.

questions.text: When a production order is created, does MRP plan raw-material consumption against your live inventory levels (not a separate stock spreadsheet)?
When production completes, do finished goods appear in inventory and become available to Sales without a manual stock adjustment?

workflows.name: Asset Lifecycle
workflows.t2_bullet: Post depreciation and disposal gain/loss from the asset register directly to GL
workflows.description: From asset acquisition through depreciation, maintenance, to disposal. Asset-heavy industries (logistics, manufacturing, F&B equipment). Tests whether the asset register drives Finance postings (depreciation, gain/loss on disposal) without manual journals.

questions.text: Does monthly depreciation post to the GL automatically from the asset's depreciation schedule, without separate journal entries?
When an asset is disposed, does the gain or loss post to the GL and the asset retire from the depreciation run in one step?

workflows.name: Returns / RMA
workflows.t2_bullet: Generate credit note from the original sales record; refund posts to AR and customer history in one step
workflows.description: From customer return request through receipt of returned goods, credit note, refund. Tests whether the credit note pulls the original sales record (not re-keyed) and whether refunds post to both AR and the customer transaction history in one step.

questions.text: When returned goods are received, is the credit note generated from the original sales record reflecting the original prices and quantities?
When a refund is issued, does it post to both the AR balance and the customer's transaction history in one step?

workflows.name: Request-to-Resolution (Field Service)
workflows.t2_bullet: Tie service ticket to inventory consumption and customer invoice from one record
workflows.description: From customer service request through technician dispatch, on-site work, parts consumption, to customer invoice. Service-business specific (HVAC, equipment maintenance, IT support). Tests whether the service ticket ties to inventory consumption and customer invoicing without manual handoff.

questions.text: When a technician consumes a part on a service job, does inventory deduct AND the part charge appear on the customer invoice from the same record?
When a service ticket is closed, does the labour time and parts auto-generate an invoice draft for the customer, without a separate billing step?
